rationale: The page contains a brief technical update on the Netra MkII airborne early warning and control system (AWACS). The majority of the page is an advertisement for a CSAT course, which is excluded from the cleaned text.
cleanedText:
6.9.6. NETRA MKII
The government has given a go-ahead to the production of next generation airborne early warning and control system (AWACS) India programme also referred to as the Netra MkII.
Netra MkII
- It will be mounted on the Airbus A321 platform.
- Key Features:
- Detect, track, and monitor threats across vast distances.
- Much more than an aircraft as it is a flying command centre which will extend our national vigilance.
